name: Cliff Burton
title: Last known photo of Cliff Burton, taken backstage after Metallica's concert in Stockholm, Sweden on September 26, 1986. He was killed in a tour bus crash hours later.
description: Cliff Burton was photographed backstage right after Metallica's concert in Stockholm, Sweden on the night of September 26, 1986. The band was touring in support of their landmark album 'Master of Puppets'. Hours later, in the early morning of September 27, the tour bus hit a patch of black ice and flipped onto its side. Burton, who was sleeping in an upper bunk — a spot he'd won in a card draw with guitarist Kirk Hammett — was thrown through a window as the bus overturned. Rescue crews attempted to use a crane to lift the bus, but it slipped and came down on Burton a second time. He was killed at the scene. He was 24 years old.
bio: Cliff Burton was the bassist for the thrash metal band Metallica. Known for his virtuosic playing and pioneering use of bass distortion, he helped shape the sound of heavy metal.
